task_frame_summary: The packet remains locally bounded, but a thinly supported future-facing sentence invites both constraint skepticism and signal-gap scrutiny without clearly forcing either one to dominate.
assumed_goal: Test whether Delta pressure materially improves the decision or only sharpens language around an already manageable bounded case.
explicit_constraints: No hidden runtime or truth path is allowed.
The future-facing sentence must not silently broaden the packet's authority.
latent_frame_risks: The sentence may be harmless shorthand.
The sentence may also be a mild scope-borrowing cue.
missing_but_decisive_questions: Is the future-facing sentence operationally meaningful or merely descriptive?
Would removing the sentence materially change the practical next step?
frame_risk_signals: one thinly supported sentence carries more posture than the rest of the packet
multiple plausible passes compete without a decisive trigger
